title: pilosella brachiata subsp. flava
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. flava is a subspecies of the Pilosella brachiata plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, thanks to its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues. In herbal preparations, Pilosella brachiata subsp. flava is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
